title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Mahindra Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
